# Lume.js

Lume.js is a minimal reactive state library using only standard JavaScript and HTML. It wires JavaScript state to the DOM using standard `data-*` attributes — no custom syntax, no virtual DOM, no build step required. Universal DOM-free core (`lume-js/state`): 1.45 KB gzipped. Full core with DOM binding (`lume-js`): 2.66 KB gzipped.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/docs/introduction)
- [Quick start](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/docs/quick-start)
- [Core concepts](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/docs/core-concepts)
- [Universal core (Node, CLI, workers)](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/docs/universal-core)
- [state()](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/docs/api-state)
- [bindDom()](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/docs/api-bindDom)
- [effect()](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/docs/api-effect)
- [batch()](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/docs/api-batch)
- [Handlers API](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/docs/api-handlers)
- [Addons — watch, computed, repeat, persist](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/docs/api-watch)

## Examples

- [Comprehensive demo](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/examples/comprehensive/index.html)
- [Batch updates](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/examples/batch/index.html)
- [Todo app](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/examples/todo/index.html)
- [Tic-Tac-Toe](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/examples/tic-tac-toe/index.html)
- [Form handling](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/examples/form-heavy/index.html)
- [List rendering](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/examples/repeat-test/index.html)
- [Template-driven lists](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/examples/template-list/index.html)
- [Handler system](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/examples/handler-demo/index.html)
- [Plugin system](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/examples/plugin-demo/index.html)
- [Debug addon](https://sathvikc.github.io/lume-js/examples/debug-demo/index.html)
